items.title: Procter & Gamble (PG): A Dividend King with Over Six Decades of Increases
items.description: The Procter & Gamble Company (NYSE:PG) is included among the 12 Best Dividend Aristocrat Stocks to Invest in Right Now. The Procter & Gamble Company (NYSE:PG) has a diverse portfolio of consumer goods that is marketed through Beauty, Grooming, Health Care, and Home Care segments, and it is based on a massive multinational scale. Operating in nearly […]

items.title: Third and Grove Acquires Elva, A Shopify Platinum Partner
items.description: Third and Grove, a full-service ecommerce and digital practice, today announces its acquisition of Elva, a digital agency recognized for its award-winning branded commerce experiences. As a Shopify Platinum Partner, the combined agency will offer clients access to the highest level of support, tools, and strategic guidance available.

items.title: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Procter & Gamble, Lowers Price Target to $153
items.description: Barclays  analyst Lauren Lieberman   maintains Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $164 to $153.
